creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
Brett,

If I were you I would

	(a) Make the appropriate patch to fix this port on -CURRENT
	(b) put this patch either in PATCH_SITES or ${FILESDIR}
	(c) add the following(or similar) to the Makefile

	.if ${OSVERSION} >= 300003
	PATCHFILES+= cam_scsi_fix.patch
	.endif

	(d) test and either file a new PR or append this one.

thanks,

- bill fumerola - billf@chc-chimes.com - BF1560 - computer horizons corp -
- ph:(800) 252-2421 - bfumerol@computerhorizons.com - billf@FreeBSD.org  -
